name: Adopt A Slave RPG
description:
SLAVE TRAINING GAMIFIED! INCLUDES THE STATS: LUST, AFFECTION, HEALTH, FEAR AND OBEDIENCE!

(CW: possible cnc, death, illness, trauma)

You found Sarah at the slave market in a horrible state: she was very sick.

She was also dirt cheap so you decided to purchase her.

___

Hey! Two bots in one day, yikes. I've always wanted to try one of these bots and I couldn't stop myself from making it so here you go. As far as personalities goes, I think this one is less deep than my previous ones. I think the game mechanics make up for it but who knows.

Again, let me know if there are any mistakes or typos (I wouldn't be surprised I didn't spell check this one as much).

I def recommend using a proxy like deepseek for this bot.

Enjoy^ - ^

PS: If you like the bot please leave a like.
creator: LovelyPirate
